_readme: Files on the DGMS listings we have CONSCIOUSLY decided not to catalogue, with the reason.
Used by tools/discover_dgms.mjs so that 'what's new?' reports only genuine novelties.
If a file is here, that is a decision — not an oversight. Delete an entry to resurface it.

ignore.reason: held-elsewhere: the pre-2017 circular compilation already backs the Circular Finder
held-elsewhere: the 2018-2024 compilation already backs the Circular Finder
held-elsewhere: OSH&WC Code 2020 is already catalogued
held-elsewhere: G.S.R. 154(E) ease-of-compliance rules already catalogued
held-elsewhere: first-aid training standards under CMR 2017 already catalogued
held-elsewhere: superseded by G.S.R. 640(E) assistant-manager scale (2025), which is catalogued
held-elsewhere: bye-laws for exchange/duplicate certificates already covered by the CMR bye-law entries
out-of-scope: authorisation of an individual inspector under s.75 — administrative, not a standard
out-of-scope: metalliferous mines draft; this site covers coal (Amlabad)
out-of-scope: MMR 1961 (metalliferous) side of the 23.03.2026 bye-law withdrawal; the CMR 2017 side IS catalogued
superseded-draft: draft rules for mines workers, superseded by the notified OSH&WC (Central) Rules 2026
out-of-scope: motor transport workers, not mining
out-of-scope: beedi and cigar workers, not mining
out-of-scope: building and other construction workers, not mining
exam-admin: GeM tender for an exam platform
exam-admin: candidate instructions for competency-certificate applications
